caption: Lila, a literature professor with a penchant for seduction, sips her cocoa on a frosty rooftop terrace, her emerald silk dress clinging to her curves as snowflakes dust her lashes. Her half-unbuttoned blazer hints at the warmth beneath, while her playful smirk and sultry gaze over her book entice passersby. ❄️💖 #UniversityGlamour #SexyTeacher #WinterWanderlust
